meta.title: AI Workflows Daily Learning
meta.refreshNote: One precise lesson every morning — 2 min read.

items.title: Today: Mobile-first forms
items.summary: 80% of Indian SMB traffic is mobile — forms must be thumb-friendly.
items.body: Do this today: open your site on phone and try the contact form.

items.title: Today: Ship one CTA only
items.summary: Landing pages convert when visitors see one clear action.
steps: Pick waitlist OR WhatsApp as primary
items.body: Do this today: remove one extra button from your homepage.

items.title: Today: SEO one URL per topic
items.summary: One focused article beats ten thin pages.
items.body: Do this today: pick one keyword and one URL for this week.

items.title: Today: Dashboard rule of 4
items.summary: Owners need four numbers daily, not forty charts.
items.body: Do this today: list the 4 metrics your client checks every morning.

items.title: Today: Proof on every claim
items.summary: Visitors trust dates, sources, and live demos — not adjectives.
steps: Link to live demo or screenshot
items.body: Do this today: add 'Last updated' to one section.

items.title: Today: WhatsApp handoff
items.summary: Bots should end with a human path, not a dead end.
items.body: Do this today: add one staff handoff line to your bot flow.

items.title: Today: Mobile-first forms
items.summary: 80% of Indian SMB traffic is mobile — forms must be thumb-friendly.
items.body: Do this today: open your site on phone and try the contact form.

items.title: Today: Ship one CTA only
items.summary: Landing pages convert when visitors see one clear action.
steps: Pick waitlist OR WhatsApp as primary
items.body: Do this today: remove one extra button from your homepage.

items.title: Today: SEO one URL per topic
items.summary: One focused article beats ten thin pages.
items.body: Do this today: pick one keyword and one URL for this week.

items.title: Today: Dashboard rule of 4
items.summary: Owners need four numbers daily, not forty charts.
items.body: Do this today: list the 4 metrics your client checks every morning.

items.title: Today: Proof on every claim
items.summary: Visitors trust dates, sources, and live demos — not adjectives.
steps: Link to live demo or screenshot
items.body: Do this today: add 'Last updated' to one section.

items.title: Daily Learning Drop: Update JSON in 5 Minutes
items.summary: Add one lesson to content/learning.json — precise title, 3 bullets, one action step.
steps: Copy yesterday's item block in learning.json
Change id, title, date, publishedAt to today
Write one problem → one fix → one action in body
items.body: Keep lessons under 120 words. End with: 'Do this today: …' Readers return when each drop is actionable, not vague.

items.title: One CTA Per Page Rule
items.summary: Landing pages convert better with a single primary action — waitlist OR WhatsApp, not five buttons.
steps: Pick one primary CTA above the fold
Move secondary links to footer or lower sections
Measure clicks for 7 days before adding more CTAs
items.proof: Stitch-style ai-workflows.cloud homepage uses single waitlist CTA
items.body: Extra buttons create decision fatigue. One bold action + proof section + showcase builds trust without noise.

items.title: Business Website Launch Checklist
items.summary: Pages, contact flow, mobile checks, and SEO basics before you go live.
items.proof: Checklist used on Mast Magan & Galaxy Decor launches
items.body: Cover homepage offer, services, contact/WhatsApp, about, privacy policy, sitemap, fast mobile layout, and one clear call-to-action above the fold.

items.title: Owner Dashboard Metrics 101
items.summary: What to show on a simple dashboard so owners run the business from one screen.
steps: Add pending tasks staff must clear
Weekly trend — not 20 charts on day one
items.body: Start with today's orders/leads, pending tasks, revenue snapshot, and staff activity. Add trends weekly.
